title.zh: 中国电池储能系统进入印度尼西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電池儲能系統進入印尼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Indonesia SNI battery safety references, IEC 62933 project expectations, UN 38.3 transport testing, K3L marking, PLN grid-connection, ESDM storage rules, and TKDN local-content requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电池储能系统文件与印度尼西亚 SNI 电池安全参考、IEC 62933 项目要求、UN 38.3 运输测试、K3L 标识、PLN 并网、ESDM 储能规则及 TKDN 本地含量要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電池儲能系統文件與印尼 SNI 電池安全參考、IEC 62933 項目要求、UN 38.3 運輸測試、K3L 標識、PLN 併網、ESDM 儲能規則及 TKDN 本地含量要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SNI scope determination, import approval, K3L registration decision, PLN grid-connection approval, ESDM licensing decision, TKDN calculation, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, project owners, and installers should verify current Indonesia SNI, ESDM, PLN, K3L, TKDN, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, tendering, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SNI适用范围裁定、进口批准、K3L登记决定、PLN并网批准、ESDM许可决定、TKDN计算、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、项目业主和安装方在出货、销售、投标或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行印度尼西亚SNI、ESDM、PLN、K3L、TKDN、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SNI適用範圍裁定、進口批准、K3L登記決定、PLN併網批准、ESDM許可決定、TKDN計算、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、項目業主和安裝方在出貨、銷售、投標或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行印尼SNI、ESDM、PLN、K3L、TKDN、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Indonesia, the safest working assumption is not a single whole-unit certification path. Map the product to adopted SNI battery standards such as SNI IEC 62619 where applicable, prepare IEC 62933-style system safety evidence for project review, keep UN 38.3 transport documentation for lithium batteries, check K3L marking or registration scope, satisfy PLN interconnection and ESDM project rules, and treat TKDN as mandatory mainly where Indonesian procurement, tariff, incentive, or public-project rules require local-content evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口印度尼西亚时，较稳妥的工作假设不是单一整机认证路径。应将产品映射至适用的已采纳SNI电池标准（如SNI IEC 62619），准备IEC 62933体系的系统安全证据用于项目审查，保留锂电池UN 38.3运输文件，核查K3L标识或登记范围，满足PLN并网及ESDM项目规则，并将TKDN主要视为在印尼采购、关税、激励或公共项目规则要求本地含量证据时的强制事项。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口印尼時，較穩妥的工作假設不是單一整機認證路徑。應將產品映射至適用的已採納SNI電池標準（如SNI IEC 62619），準備IEC 62933體系的系統安全證據用於項目審查，保留鋰電池UN 38.3運輸文件，核查K3L標識或登記範圍，滿足PLN併網及ESDM項目規則，並將TKDN主要視為在印尼採購、關稅、激勵或公共項目規則要求本地含量證據時的強制事項。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
